description: You are a Data Quality Engineer managing an Industrial IoT platform. The web traffic speed sensor occasionally produces wild spikes due to hardware resets, causing standard threshold alerts to false-trigger. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Sensor Quality Analysis' for the metric 'servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1' that filters out transient noise and isolates sustained anomalies. The dashboard must contain three graphs: 'Raw vs Median Filter' showing the raw metric and a 15-minute movingMedian; 'Absolute Anomaly Score' showing the absolute difference (diffSeries) between the raw metric and the median baseline; and 'Severe Anomalies Only' showing the absolute anomaly score with a removeBelowValue threshold of 5. Save the dashboard when complete.
